_instructions: Copy to defaults.json. Set each field's "value". Keys starting with _ are ignored. Plain values also work (see defaults.json). The entire location block is optional — leave fields empty/null if you have no home location.

city.description: City or town (optional — with lat/lon or city set, weather uses this as your default)

postal_code.description: Postal code (CA) or ZIP code (US), e.g. "K1A 0A6" or "90210"

latitude.description: Decimal degrees, -90 to 90. Set with longitude for default weather.

longitude.description: Decimal degrees, -180 to 180. Set with latitude for default weather.

timezone.note: Any valid IANA timezone name works; the list above is a set of common examples

name.description: Name the assistant uses when speaking (LLM system prompt)
